name: @gameai/rig-animation
description: Engine-neutral data-driven rigid Joint animation contracts, validation, normalization, and sampling.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.runtime.json && node scripts/mark-runtime-esm.mjs && node scripts/copy-schema.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm run evidence:red-cap-idle && pnpm run evidence:stickman && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/test/*.test.js
